description:
The kernel of semantic subtyping: T <: U iff (T ∧ ¬U) is empty.

Implement is_empty(d: Descr) recursively over structural parts with memoization (recursive types -> coinductive treatment). This is the hard kernel — get this right and everything else falls out.

Deliverable: is_empty + is_subtype + is_equiv functions; tests covering nontrivial cases like (int|atom) <: (int|atom|float), (int & not(int)) is empty, structural subtyping on tuples and arrows.
title: Subtyping via emptiness checking
